zh.lifeSummary: 當Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna於1018年出生在德國薩辛薩阿爾可萊斯維廷時，他的父親Dietrich II of Wettin33歲，母親Mathilde von Meissen28歲。他於大約1037年與Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1089年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna于1018年出生在德国薩辛薩阿爾可萊斯維廷时，他的父亲Dietrich II of Wettin33岁，母亲Mathilde von Meissen28岁。他于大约1037年与Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1089年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wettin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Johan, Tor.
Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an altered form of the (placename) element väst ‘west’ + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’. Compare Westen .

variants.name: Westen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Shosh, Shoshana.  German Ulrich.

German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German, Middle Low German, Middle Dutch westen, German Westen ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for one who had migrated from further west. The Jewish name may also be of ornamental origin.

Swedish (mainly Westén): ornamental or habitational name formed with an altered form of the (placename) element väst ‘west’ + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Westin .

nameMeanings.name: Gero
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gertrude
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna was born in 1018, in Wettin, Saalkreis, Saxony, Germany, his father, Dietrich II of Wettin, was 33 and his mother, Mathilde von Meissen, was 28. He married Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg about 1037. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1089.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna est né en 1018, à Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich II of Wettin, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Meissen, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg environ 1037. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1089.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna 1018 in Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich II of Wettin 33 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Meissen 28. Er hat um 1037 Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1089.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna è nato il nel 1018 nel Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Dietrich II of Wettin, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Meissen, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg circa 1037. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1089.

ja.lifeSummary: Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehnaが1018年にドイツサチセンサアルクレイスウエッティンで生まれた時，父Dietrich II of Wettinは33歳，母Mathilde von Meissenは28歳であった。約1037年にGräfin Bertha von Schwarzburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1089年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna(이)가 1018년 독일 작센 사알크레이스 w틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich II of Wettin(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Meissen(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1037년 Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1089년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna nasceu em 1018, em Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Dietrich II of Wettin, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Meissen, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg aproximadamente 1037. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1089.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna родился в 1018 г. в местности веттинь, саалкрис, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Dietrich II of Wettin было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Meissen, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg около 1037 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1089 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gero von Wettin Graf von Brehna nació en 1018, en Wettin, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Dietrich II of Wettin, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Meissen, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Gräfin Bertha von Schwarzburg aproximadamente 1037. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1089.
